MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF KERRY MANSFIELD's Motion To Set Aside Dismissal Of Complaint And Default Pursuant To Ccp 473.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter is off calendar. Mansfield seeks to vacate the January 11, 2021 order that dismissed the complaint and sent the cross-complaint out for a prove up hearing. Judge Feng in department 206 issued that order, which has not been reduced to writing, because Mansfield failed to appear at the trial call. Mansfield may re-set this motion before Judge Feng in Department 206. (See Paul Blanco's Good Car Co. Auto Group v. Superior Court (2020) 56 Cal.App.5th 86, 99-102 ["As a general rule, a trial judge cannot overturn the order of another trial judge."]; In re Marriage of Oliverez (2015) 238 Cal.App.4th 1242, 1247 ["A trial court's discretion to reconsider another judge's prior ruling is necessarily narrow and usually only appropriate when the prior judge is unavailable"].)
